title: The Continuous Feedback Loop of EDA
description: A flowchart illustrating the iterative, non-linear process of Exploratory Data Analysis and how Continuous Internal Evaluation informs each step.
relationships: The process cycles iteratively. 'Evaluation & Insight Generation' feeds directly back into 'Question/Hypothesis Formulation' and 'Deeper Analysis', creating a continuous internal feedback loop that refines the entire analysis.
